title: Structic Relative Slab Deflection Calculator
description: The calculator allows the assessment of compatibility between any given stick curtain walling system and the movement of the structure to which it is to be fixed. This considers the effects of vertical edge beam deflection, inter-storey drift and differential foundation settlement.

panel_span.description: Panel Span. Symbol: Panel \;Span. Units: mm. Span between columns along panel length.

deflection_shape.description: Deflection Shape. Symbol: D_{Shape}. Deflection shape for supporting slab.

max_deflection.description: Maximum Slab Deflection. Symbol: D_{max}. Units: mm. Maximum expected mid-span deflection in slab supporting curtain wall. Value is negative, indicating downward deflection.

foundation_settlement.description: Foundation Settlement. Symbol: FS. Units: mm. Differential settlement in supporting foundations.

sway.description: Floor to Floor Sway. Symbol: S. Units: mm. Lateral deflection between slab under / over curtain wall. Note, each panel is checked for sway acting opposite to the tilt direction.

min_spacing.description: Min Mullion Spacing. Symbol: Min_{Spacing}. Units: mm

mullion_span.description: Mullion Span. Symbol: Mullion \; Span. Units: mm. Vertical span of mullion members, i.e. slab to soffit clear dimension.

transom_spacing.description: Transom Spacing. Symbol: Spacing. Units: mm. Vertical spacing of transom members.

mullion_table.description: Mullion Setout. Setout of mullion members.

profile_width.description: Profile Width. Symbol: W. Units: mm. Total width of curtain wall profile.

nose_width.description: Nose Width. Symbol: N. Units: mm. Width of curtain wall nose.

side_edge_cover.description: Nominal Side Edge Cover. Symbol: C1. Units: mm. Distance from inside edge of glass to outside of profile.

top_edge_cover.description: Nominal Top Edge Cover. Symbol: C2. Units: mm. Distance from top edge of glass to outside of profile.

btm_edge_cover.description: Nominal Bottom Edge Cover. Symbol: C3. Units: mm. Distance from bottom edge of glass to outside of profile.

minimum_cover.description: Minimum Edge Cover. Symbol: C_{min}. Units: mm. Minimum allowable edge cover.

fabrication_tolerance.description: Fabrication Tolerance. Symbol: Tol. Units: mm. Panel fabrication tolerance (+/- value).

support_position.description: Vertical Support Position. Symbol: P_{Support}. Units: mm. Location of vertical panel supports from inside face of mullion.

packing_position.description: Lateral Packing Position. Symbol: P_{Pack}. Units: mm. Location of lateral packing from underside of transom.

packing_thickness.description: Packing Thickness. Symbol: T_{Pack}. Units: mm. Thickness of packing material.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
